description: Phase 1 app-command allow-list. Tauri v2 denies every command that is not explicitly named in `permissions`; adding a command requires touching this file, the Rust `#[tauri::command]` definition, and the TS `Commands` map in `@dayseam/ipc-types` in the same PR. `dev_*` commands are dev-only — in release builds they are compiled out by the `dev-commands` Cargo feature *and* they should be removed from this allow-list before shipping a notarised bundle.
